brief_summary: Three large Prussian-red stat blocks: 121k views / 141 replies on GeekHack IC, +38 direction up on the W19 trends tracker, and May 15 2026 open date at KBDfans (single global host). Footer surfaces the IC-position context ('ahead of Metro System and Selene') and the palette story ('red-on-cream Bauhaus · one ochre modifier accent').
data_sources: gmk-cyl-prussian-alert.mdx § lede + 'Why this is on the radar' — 'the GeekHack interest-check thread cleared 121k views and 141 replies before a single base kit went up for order, putting it ahead of where Metro System and Selene were sitting ... Prussian Alert sits on this week's /trends/tracker board at +38, direction up'
